evals.prompt: turn my README into a landing page
evals.expected_output: README.md rewritten with landing page structure (hero, problem, solution, how it works, social proof, FAQ, CTA). README.backup.md created as backup. Technical content preserved in <details> blocks.

evals.prompt: make my README sell the project — I want more GitHub stars and contributors
evals.expected_output: README.md rewritten with persuasive copy focusing on attracting contributors. Should use benefit-focused language, CTAs, and social proof section. README.backup.md created.

evals.prompt: rewrite my README as a landing page, use the StoryBrand framework
evals.expected_output: README.md rewritten using StoryBrand framework specifically (user as hero, project as guide). README.backup.md created. Framework choice explained to user.
